3177070.name: Frontline Inferno
3177070.description:
Step into the boots of a soldier from the Axis, Soviet, or Allied forces and engage in thrilling, rapid-fire battles across colorful, stylized battlegrounds. Frontline Inferno is an action-packed FPS arena shooter that combines the historical setting of World War II with an arcade twist, delivering frantic gunfights, instant respawns, and total freedom in how you gear up.

  • Non-stop, fast-paced combat – The action never slows down. Sprint, shoot, and respawn as quickly as you fall, keeping the gameplay constantly intense and dynamic. Whether you're flanking or charging head-on, there’s no time to breathe.

  • Vertical, multi-layered maps – Battle across uniquely designed arenas inspired by real WWII locations. From bombed-out cities to underground bunkers, each map offers vertical gameplay and dynamic layouts that keep players on their toes. Master the environment to gain the upper hand!

  • Vibrant low-poly visuals – Forget gritty realism – Frontline Inferno delivers the war in bright, bold, and colorful low-poly graphics that bring a playful and approachable vibe to the intensity of the action. It’s World War II like you’ve never seen it before.

  • Customizable characters – Stand out from the crowd with a variety of customization options. From helmets and uniforms to accessories, personalize your soldier's look and hit the battlefield in style.

Experience frantic multiplayer deathmatches where you choose your side in a battle between Axis, Soviets, and Allies. Join the fight in team-based skirmishes across small, intense maps designed for high-octane combat. No complex strategies – just raw, arcade action.

Frontline Inferno is perfect for players who crave fast-paced, skill-based shooters with a nostalgic arcade feel. Ideal for both casual gamers looking to jump into quick, action-packed sessions and FPS veterans who love chaotic, no-holds-barred gameplay.
3177070.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西
*具有完全音频支持的语言
